mapper.sql: id, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar, badge, website, bio, role, is_enabled, deleted_at, last_login, github_id, google_id, qq_id, microsoft_id, feishu_open_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select count(*) from users where email = #{email}
mapper.insert: insert into users (email, password_hash, nickname, avatar, badge, website, role, is_enabled) values (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{badge}, #{website}, #{role}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: update users set last_login = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update users set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update users set deleted_at = current_timestamp, is_enabled = false where id = #{id}

update users
github_id = '', google_id = '', qq_id = '', microsoft_id = '', feishu_open_id = '',
updated_at = current_timestamp
where id = #{id}

choose.when: and password_hash is not null and password_hash <> ''

mapper.select:
select from users
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update users set email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, badge = #{badge}, website = #{website}, bio = #{bio}, role = #{role}, is_enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
